year_cycle: Every 12 years when Jupiter enters Leo (Simha Rashi)

main_period.note: Exact dates subject to astronomical calculations and official Maharashtra government announcement

shahi_snan.name: Shravani Purnima / Raksha Bandhan Snan
shahi_snan.name_hi: श्रावणी पूर्णिमा / रक्षा बंधन शाही स्नान
shahi_snan.significance: First major royal bathing — all 13 Akharas participate
shahi_snan.significance_hi: पहला प्रमुख शाही स्नान — सभी 13 अखाड़े भाग लेते हैं

shahi_snan.name: Naga Panchami Snan
shahi_snan.significance: Naga Sadhus take the holy dip in a grand procession
shahi_snan.significance_hi: नागा साधु भव्य जुलूस में पवित्र डुबकी लगाते हैं

shahi_snan.name: Shravani Amavasya Snan
shahi_snan.significance_hi: अमावस्या स्नान — पितृ तर्पण होता है

shahi_snan.name: Simhastha Purnima — Main Kumbh Snan (Maha Kumbh Snan)
shahi_snan.name_hi: सिंहस्थ पूर्णिमा — मुख्य कुंभ स्नान (महा कुंभ स्नान)
shahi_snan.name_mr: सिंहस्थ पौर्णिमा — मुख्य कुंभ स्नान (महा कुंभ स्नान)
shahi_snan.significance: THE most sacred bath — Jupiter in Leo + Full Moon. Missing this is considered a great loss for a devotee
shahi_snan.significance_hi: सबसे पवित्र स्नान — गुरु सिंह राशि में + पूर्णिमा। इसे छोड़ना बहुत बड़ी हानि मानी जाती है
shahi_snan.note: Arrive previous night — roads closed 6 hours before snan

shahi_snan.name: Bhadrapad Amavasya — Pitru Paksha Snan
shahi_snan.significance: Pitru Paksha begins — ancestors' souls liberated with Godavari bath
shahi_snan.significance_hi: पितृ पक्ष प्रारंभ — गोदावरी में स्नान से पूर्वजों की आत्मा को मोक्ष मिलता है

peshwai_processions.note: Naga Sadhus march first — thousands of ash-covered sadhus

akhara_bathing_order.note: Order decided by Akhara Parishad. First right always goes to Shaiva Akharas then Vaishnava Akharas

general_info.best_time_to_visit: Early morning 4am-8am for bathing to avoid extreme crowds
general_info.best_time_hi: स्नान के लिए सुबह 4-8 बजे जाएं — कम भीड़ होती है
general_info.dress_code: Traditional attire preferred, modest clothing mandatory at ghats
general_info.photography: No photography of Naga Sadhus without permission
general_info.alcohol_tobacco: Strictly prohibited throughout the Kumbh area
general_info.footwear: Remove before entering ghats and temples
